doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice with entirely different subsections; this text fabricates definitions, paralegal supervision provisions, and state sanction claims.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 concerns multijurisdictional practice with different subsections; this text invents definitions, paralegal-supervision provisions, and state-sanction claims not in the real rule.
